title: Looking for some developer/compliance requirements
excerpt: I remember reading about some requirements for marketplace apps. Something about needing to remove customer data after 10 days, and not moving customer data out of monday (or making it publicly viewable?) unless the cust…

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml: I remember reading about some requirements for marketplace apps. Something about needing to remove customer data after 10 days, and not moving customer data out of monday (or making it publicly viewable?) unless the customer (admin?) agrees. I just cannot find this page anymore. I’d love to know what these constraints and requirements were. Cheers.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @reinier,

Is this what you were looking for?

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml: No, unfortunately not. I’ve started to wonder whether I’ve dreamt it… Are there no restrictions/requirements as to storing/using/publishing the customer’s data outside monday? (Stored securely and on a user’s request, obviously!) Take Board to website widget as an example. That’s no problem?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @reinier,

I recommend you to check this directly with our Marketplace review team here

They will be able to guide you on that!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml: Found it! It’s the Developer terms as linked from App > Manage > Share.
